rationale: Builds on state/best_script.py by applying the modified training logic (quant-aware snapshot averaging over projection + mlp.fc weights) in a compact self-contained launcher. Required markers are preserved, runtime behavior keeps MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS and final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact intact, and script stays well under 1500 lines.
title: Embedded Payload Runner With Quant-Aware Snapshot Averaging Patch
